text: cleared my UI i didnt even know i had one.. feeling sick dizzy made vision in eye go funny. made tendons in whole body swell made muscels feel like they are burning. i cant excercise now because i have to let me tentons heal . i dont know how long it will take. brain fog extream fear and emotional . please dont ever take this medication im horrified by how it made me feel in such a short amout of time
